positional_bias.note: Re-derived = index per MCQ from quiz.gift; matches meta correct_position_distribution exactly. max_share 2/6 = 0.333 <= 0.40.

length_bias.note: Honest per-block measure (feedback stripped). Only q2 has its = option as the strict longest (>1.20x distractor mean) and it is an unavoidable obligation enumeration. q6's correct option is comparable in length to two distractors, NOT strictly longest, so I count 1/6 not the meta's 2/6 — either is <= 0.40. q1/q3/q4/q5 have a distractor as the longest line. Correct answer is NOT systematically longest.

distractor_plausibility.note: All 18 distractors map to real beginner misconceptions: high-risk banned outright, no duties on a maker's say-so, buyer-approval-only, equal/no split of provider-deployer duties, post-market or buyer-run conformity check, AI supervising humans, fully unattended/yearly oversight. None scored 1 (absurd).

objective_coverage.note: All 5 corpus section-3 LOs have >=1 matching question; no orphans. Standard profile, 6 MCQ, no short-answer expected (include_short_answer=false).

beginner_fairness_on_headline.note: EU AI Act spelled out on first use (q1 stem). Stems plain-language, answerable from this topic alone. Every question tests the OBLIGATIONS (incl. provider/deployer split, conformity assessment, human oversight, before-vs-ongoing ordering). No tier-definition (5.7), no prohibited-uses (5.9), no NIST/EO/India (5.10-5.12), no Article/Annex numbers. On-headline.

gift_validity.note: Clean parse: $CATEGORY present, 6 well-formed ::id:: blocks, each exactly one '=' + three '~', per-option #feedback, '####' general feedback, no stem-level '#'. No literal colons in stems/answers requiring \: escaping.

verdict: Pass — positional (max_share 0.333), length (longest_correct_rate 0.167, honest re-measure undercounts meta's 2/6 by one at q6 but still clean), distractor plausibility (absurd_rate 0.0), objective coverage (all 5 LOs hit, no orphans), beginner-fair + on-headline (obligations only, EU AI Act spelled, no adjacent-topic leak), and GIFT validity all clean.
